content.rendered:
[vc_row full_height=”yes” columns_placement=”middle” enable_overlay=”yes” el_class=”innerTitleBanner contactTitle” css=”.vc_custom_1729622959259{background-image: url(https://aurahairstudio.ca/wp-content/uploads/2024/10/shutterstock_2197793759.webp?id=62971) !important;background-position: center !important;background-repeat: no-repeat !important;background-size: cover !important;}” overlay_bg=”rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2)”][vc_column][vc_column_text]

Contact Us

 

Ready to book your next appointment or have any questions? At Aura Hair Studio, we’re here to help you achieve your perfect look. Whether it’s a haircut, colour, or special event styling, our experienced team is ready to assist. Call us or visit us at our Innisfil Hair Salon![/vc_column_text][vc_widget_sidebar sidebar_id=”bookingwidget” el_class=”mainBannerBtn bottomBannerBtn”][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class=”contactRow”][vc_column width=”1/2″ el_class=”contactBox”]

Phone

+1 705-618-2872

Address

4171 Innisfil Beach Road Innisfil,
ON, L0L 2N0 Canada

Opening Hours

Saturday – Monday:          Closed
Tuesday:                         9am to 7pm
Wednesday – Thursday: 10am to 8pm
Friday:                             9am to 6pm

[/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/2″ el_class=”googleMap”][vc_gmaps link=”#E-8_”][/vc_column][/vc_row]
